case_title: PAUL TONKIN VS. 1150 FOLSOM STREET OWNER'S ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONKIN, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 1150 FOLSOM STREET OWNER'S ASSOCIATION $7,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,540.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,450.00 FILED BY TONKIN, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT 1150 FOLSOM STREET OWNER'S ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 1150 FOLSOM STREET OWNER'S ASSOCIATION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TONKIN, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT 1150 FOLSOM STREET OWNER'S ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF PAUL TONKIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1150 FOLSOM STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LOV GOEL, PRESIDENT OF HOA. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
